overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game, featuring a character traversing a post-apocalyptic mountainous forest. The character runs along a rocky trail, crosses a shallow stream, and ascends toward distant ruins while surrounded by pine trees, fallen logs, and mountain vistas.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with scattered pine trees and fallen timber

events.description: stream becomes visible ahead as the trail approaches the water

agents.ego_description: running along the forest trail toward the stream ahead, navigating around fallen logs

entered.detail: tall rocky mountains with misty peaks forming the backdrop
evergreen trees scattered along the mountainside
large decaying logs and uprooted trees lining the path
uneven dirt and stone path winding through the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wide mountain trail surrounded by pine trees and fallen logs. The path leads toward a distant mountain range visible through the haze, with a stream becoming visible ahead as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain stream with rocky banks

events.description: character steps into the shallow stream, transitioning from trail to water
character exits the stream onto the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream, moving against the current toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: shallow flowing water with visible rocks beneath the surface
steep earthen and stone bank lining the stream

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow mountain stream, wading through flowing water between rocky banks. The enclosed stream bed limits sky visibility while the character crosses to the opposite side, where the terrain opens up again.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ascent with valley overlook

events.description: valley vista with red vegetation becomes visible to the left as the path ascends
distant ruins and structures come into view ahead on the mountainside

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky mountain path, moving steadily uphill toward distant structures while the valley falls away to the left

entered.detail: sweeping valley view with distinctive red and pink flowering plants covering the lower slopes
ancient or post-apocalyptic structures and debris visible on the mountainside ahead

segments.scene_description: Ascending the mountain trail, the character emerges onto an open slope revealing a vast valley covered in red vegetation below. The path continues upward toward mysterious ruins visible in the distance, with dead trees and rocky outcrops lining the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a forested mountain trail through a shallow stream and up toward a vast, open valley. It begins with the character running along a wide path flanked by pine trees and fallen logs, heading toward a distant, hazy mountain range. As the character reaches the edge of the trail, the scene shifts into a shallow stream where the camera follows them wading through flowing water between rocky banks that momentarily obscure the sky. The terrain then opens up as the character exits the water and ascends a steep slope, revealing a sprawling valley covered in red vegetation below. Finally, the path continues upward past dead trees and rocky outcrops, turning toward mysterious ruins perched in the distance.
